string-array.name: face_error_vendor
string-array.item: Kāore e taea te whakamahi i te wetemaukati kanohi. Wetemaukatitia tō pūrere mā tētahi atu aratuka.
Kāore e taea te wetemaukati. Kua kitea he kanohi wāhanga.

string-array.name: fingerprint_acquired_vendor
string-array.item: Kia iti noa iho te rerekē o te whakanoho matimati i ia wā. Me ngana ano.

string-array.name: sms_roaming_guard_modes
string-array.item: Tuku Aunoa ina noho i roto i te pānuitanga ā-kāinga

string-array.name: wfcOperatorErrorAlertMessages
string-array.item: Hei waea me te tuku karere mā te Wi-Fi, i te tuatahi tonoa tō kaikawe kia tatū i tēnei ratonga. Kātahi ka whakakā anō i te waea Wi-Fi mai i Ngā Tautuhinga. (Waehere hapa: %1$s)

string-array.name: wfcOperatorErrorNotificationMessages
string-array.item: Tukua te rēhita waea Wi‑Fi ki tō kaikawe: %1$s
